STEP2: PowerPoint found
STEP3: Getting selection
STEP4: Selection type: 2
STEP5: Getting shape
STEP6: Shape name: Rectangle 1
STEP7: Building data
STEP8: Converting to JSON
STEP8a: Saving native PPTX for accurate color preservation
STEP8a1: No template provided, creating blank presentation with Office default theme
STEP8a2: Adding blank slide
STEP8a3: Pasting selected shape
STEP8a3: Shape pasted successfully
STEP8b: Saving native PPTX (temp)
STEP8c: Copying native PPTX to target
STEP8d: Native PPTX saved (theme from template or default)
STEP9: Outputting JSON
{"name":"Rectangle 1","type":1,"autoShapeName":"msoShapeRectangle","left":1.25,"top":2.5,"width":3,"height":1.5,"rotation":0,"adjustments":[],"nativePptxRelPath":"native/shape_captured_1700000000000.pptx","fillColor":"#4472C4","fillTransparency":0,"lineColor":"#2E528F","lineWeight":0.75,"lineTransparency":0}
STEP10: Done
